creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please add related issue ID's in the respective Depends On / Blocks or See Also fields

Other review items:

- Remove "A " from COMMENT (portlint)
- BUILD depends before RUN_DEPENDS
- Add LICENSE_FILE when one is provided in the source distribution file

Please run the port through QA (portlint, poudriere) to confirm that it passes prior to submitting issues
